script_text: Some words have more than one meaning!
The word bat can be a baseball bat, or a little flying animal.
Let us learn how to tell which meaning fits.
Read the whole sentence. It gives you a clue.
The boy swung the bat at the ball.
Listen. The bat flew out of the cave at night.
Did a baseball bat fly? No!
This bat is the flying animal. The sentence gave us the clue.
When a word could mean two things, read the whole sentence for clues.
Now you are ready to be a word meaning detective!
